feat.name: Deliberate Death
feat.special: You can select this feat only at 1st level, and you can't retrain into or out of this feat.
feat.text: Once, you died because someone—murderer, monster, or soldier— chose to strike you down. Just before losing consciousness, make a melee Strike against the triggering creature.

traits.name: Duskwalker
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the duskwalker versatile heritage. Duskwalkers are planar scions infused with the supernatural energy of psychopomps.

feat.trigger: You are about to gain the dying condition as a result of another creature's attack or ability, and that creature is within your melee reach.
